title: Shattering Hot Brazilian Tomatoes Stir-fry
description: Winey, shattering, and deliciously complex, this Brazilian-inspired dish is perfect for a sick day when you need something to clear your sinuses and warm your belly. Made with grape tomatoes, aromatic spices, and a hint of turmeric, this recipe is an Ayurvedic and sattvic-friendly twist on traditional stir-fry.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a medium-sized copper mug over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add chopped onion and saut09 until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add halved grape tomatoes, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and black pepper. Stir-fry for 4-5 minutes, until the tomatoes start to shatter and release their juices.
Season with salt to taste, then garnish with chopped cilantro. Serve immediately, with a side of rice or roti if desired.
